info.description: The interactive Nervous System Decoder quiz at /free/nervous-system-decoder/quiz. Hero copy + the 3 state result blurbs are editable here. The questions and scoring weights stay in code (technical content that doesn't change often).

title.default: Which state is your nervous system in?

intro.default: A few short questions, no email required to see your result. At the end you get one of three readings (Ventral, Sympathetic, Dorsal) and a practice you can use today.

results.description: Three result blurbs (one per state: ventral, sympathetic, dorsal). Don't add or remove entries — the 3 states match the quiz scoring logic. Title, blurb, practice, meditation URL, and CTA ARE editable.
